description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist rectangular design, set on a grassy plot. The structure features clean white exterior walls and large, blue-tinted glass windows that wrap around multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light. A prominent feature is the large rectangular swimming pool adjacent to the main building, seamlessly integrated into the landscape. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level slightly offset, creating a cantilevered effect over the lower floor. The rear side of the house displays a series of vertical window slits, while the front includes a main entryway beneath an overhang. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing geometric lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large blue-tinted windows, and a rectangular swimming pool, set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's white walls, large blue-tinted windows, and the swimming pool to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway under an overhang, the pool in the foreground, and the upper story's cantilevered design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pool on the right and a clear view of the house's layered, rectangular structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a series of vertical window slits and the solid, geometric back wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway under a flat overhang, minimalistic with no visible steps or decorative columns
